DP.434.0000:
I saw people riding their Bikes
and using a log just like a bridge.
DP.434.0001:
...Am I stuck in the bog?\f
Of course not. How silly!
This is a full-body mud pack.\f
If it weren’t, I would be squirming
and struggling to get out!
DP.434.0002:
I caught a rare Pokémon in Pastoria’s
Great Marsh.\f
You definitely have to go.
I recommend it without hesitation.
DP.434.0003:
We’re on constant patrol.
It’s safe here, even at night.
DP.434.0006:
Trainer Tips\f
If you get stuck in the bog, you can
count on being there a while.\f
There’s no need to panic.
Just struggle and squirm for a bit.\f
Bicycles cannot be ridden on marshy
ground, incidentally.
